title: T3 Ingestion: build tools/verify-provenance.py (8-rule provenance validator)
prompt: Build tools/verify-provenance.py in ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory — the executable form of the 8 validation rules in docs/provenance-spec.md (section 'Validation rules'), today a manual checklist only (docs/ingestion-workflow.md Step 8). Single stdlib-only Python file. Contract: validate one or more artifact dirs (folders containing provenance.json), plus --all (glob canonical/*/*/provenance.json from the repo root, resolved from the script's own location) and --self-test; exit 0 = all pass (including --all finding zero artifacts — canonical/ holds only INDEX.md today, an empty library is not an error), exit 1 = any FAIL, exit 2 = usage/IO error; findings printed one per line as 'FAIL <artifact> R<n>: <detail>' (rules R1 json-parses, R2 required-fields incl. per-origin, R3 verbatim_copy exists relative to artifact dir — directories legal for multi-file origins, R4 no orphan files in _source/, R5 rewrite_status enum, R6 version positive int rejecting bools, R7 len(version_history)==version-1, R8 no empty origins[i].kept) and 'WARN' for advisory-only checks (missing source_commit/source_url/research_sources, id/date format) which never affect exit code. --self-test builds 11 fixture cases in a temp dir (1 clean incl. a directory-valued verbatim_copy, 8 rule-specific breakages incl. the version:true bool trap, 1 warn-only-still-passes) asserting expected rule ids present AND unexpected FAIL ids absent, prints 'self-test: 11/11 cases ok', exits 0 iff green. Then update the two doc pointers: drop '(when written)' from provenance-spec.md line ~5 and rewrite ingestion-workflow.md's 'Manual checklist (until ... exist)' line ~99 to say the first three items are now automated while style items stay manual until tools/style-check.py exists — nothing else in either doc. Do NOT build style-check.py, do NOT create or modify anything under canonical/ or research/ (fixtures live only in deleted temp dirs; if real artifacts exist in canonical/ at execution, report their validation results but never edit them). Commit and push dark-factory. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-03-verify-provenance-tool.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: tools/verify-provenance.py exists, imports only stdlib (json/sys/os/re/argparse/pathlib/tempfile/shutil). python3 tools/verify-provenance.py --self-test exits 0 printing 11 ok-case lines and 'self-test: 11/11 cases ok'. --all exits 0 (prints 'no artifacts found under canonical/' while the library is empty, or a per-artifact report if artifacts landed). Invoking with a nonexistent dir, a dir lacking provenance.json, or no args each exits 2 without traceback. A hand-built temp artifact with kept:[] exits 1 with a 'R8' finding (live negative demo from the war game's Verification block). docs/provenance-spec.md no longer says '(when written)' and docs/ingestion-workflow.md no longer says 'Manual checklist (until' while still referencing verify-provenance.py; docs diff is ~2 lines across the 2 files. Negative: tools/style-check.py does NOT exist; git status shows zero changes under canonical/ and research/. The feat(tools) commit is pushed and the tree is clean of this ticket's files.
